warnings: Dropped 1 non-scored row(s) worth 0 points (Penalty Points). Check they really aren't scored.
_review.note: Machine-parsed from the official rating sheet. plan.md F3: nobody may be graded against this until a human confirms it.
_review.paraphrase_note: Descriptions and level descriptors are restated in our own words (plan.md §20). Criterion names and every point value are exactly as published on the official rating sheet.

criteria.name: Topic & Theme
criteria.description: The presentation integrates the given subject matter and maintains a unified central idea.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The designated subject is absent from the presentation.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The given subject is not distinctly integrated into the presentation.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The given subject was distinctly integrated into the presentation.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The given subject was distinctly integrated and comprehensively developed throughout the presentation, utilizing personal anecdotes.

criteria.name: Introduction
criteria.description: Present the opening segment of the talk.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The presentation lacked an opening section.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The opening segment was not distinctly delivered.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The opening segment was distinctly delivered, and the subject was explained.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The opening segment was distinctly delivered, the subject was explained, and an effective bridge to the main content was provided.

criteria.name: Supporting Information (Body)
criteria.description: Present factual and relevant details to back up the main points.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The presentation lacked a central subject.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Several subjects were introduced without evident links between them.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The primary subjects were recognized, linked, and substantiated across the entire presentation.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The primary subjects were recognized, linked, and substantiated across the entire presentation, employing fluid transitions to effectively reinforce the main subject.

criteria.name: Conclusion
criteria.description: Deliver a strong closing statement that ties back to the main subject and overall message.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The presentation ended without a concluding section.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The closing statement was not distinctly delivered.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A strong closing statement was delivered.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The closing statement establishes a link to the entirety of the presentation.

criteria.name: Speech Delivery: Pace and Filler Words
criteria.description: Present the talk at a suitable speed, avoiding unnecessary vocalizations.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The speaker's delivery speed was erratic, either excessively quick or sluggish, combined with an overuse of verbal pauses.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The delivery speed was inconsistent and distracting, accompanied by a noticeable number of verbal pauses.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The speaker maintained a suitable delivery speed with very few verbal pauses.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The speaker maintained a varied and appropriate delivery speed, completely eliminating verbal pauses, which fully captivated the audience.

criteria.name: Speech Delivery: Eye Contact and Facial Expressions
criteria.description: Present the talk with diverse facial expressions and maintain excellent visual engagement with the judges.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The speaker fails to make eye contact or exhibit varied facial expressions.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The speaker displays limited varied facial expressions and/or minimal eye contact.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The speaker uses suitable facial expressions and maintains appropriate eye contact.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The speaker maintains appropriate eye contact and facial expressions, and does not rely on notecards.

criteria.name: Speech Delivery: Voice Projection
criteria.description: Present the talk with clear and sufficient vocal volume.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The speaker's voice lacks adequate volume.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The speaker's voice projection is minimal.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The speaker uses appropriate voice projection.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The speaker uses appropriate voice projection and clear articulation.

criteria.name: Speech Delivery: Self-confidence, Poise, and Posture
criteria.description: Present the talk with assurance, composure, and proper body alignment.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The speaker did not exhibit assurance, composure, or proper body alignment.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The speaker exhibited assurance, composure, or proper body alignment.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The speaker exhibited a high degree of assurance, composure, and proper body alignment.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The speaker exhibited a high degree of assurance, composure, proper body alignment, and assertiveness.

criteria.name: Demonstrates the ability to effectively answer questions
criteria.description: Shows the capacity to provide clear and accurate responses to inquiries.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The speaker does not reply to questions, or their replies are completely irrelevant.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The speaker provides incomplete or unclear replies that indicate limited comprehension.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The speaker replies accurately and clearly to most questions, demonstrating sufficient comprehension.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The speaker replies confidently with clear, accurate, and insightful answers that enhance the overall presentation.

criteria.name: Adherence to Competitive Events Guidelines
criteria.description: The presentation's execution aligns with the specified rules: (All conditions must be satisfied) The presentation matched the assigned subject. No materials were left behind after the presentation. The use of food, live animals, technology, visuals, and props was avoided.

levels.label: Execution Aligned with Guidelines
levels.descriptor: The presentation matched the assigned subject. No materials were left behind after the presentation. The use of food, live animals, technology, visuals, and props was avoided.
